commit_message:
Fix some details, make it can be simulated by verilator Fix some details, make it can be simulated by verilator There is a bit-width error on the main module, and a peculiar error which can be repaired simply by adding some comment statements that can have an effect on verilator's compiler.

Now we can use verilator to simulator these modules directly
